task_description: Improve code quality, maximize test coverage, add coverage thresholds and CI reporting, refactor Lambda for modularity, and capture reflections in EXPERIMENT.md.

verification.summary: All 200 tests pass. Coverage: 100% statements/lines/functions, 96.66% branches. TypeScript compiles without errors. New tests exercise real code paths (string stream handling, non-Error thrown values) and would fail if the code were reverted.
